arts.ttl: Chelsea vs PSG – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Chelsea and PSG meet in the final of the FIFA Club World Cup at the MetLife Stadium this evening. The two teams will battle to be crowned world champions in New Jersey, in the conclusion of FIFA’s expanded Club World Cup tournament. All roads lead to this. 🏆#FIFACWC pic.twitter.com/hmNuzpO7qG — FIFA Club World Cup (@FIFACWC) […] The post Chelsea vs PSG – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: PSG Predicted Lineup vs. Chelsea: Unchanged From Dominant Semifinal
arts.sum: CM: Vitinha— Chelsea will seek to win the ball high up the pitch, and they must get to the beating heart of PSG’s fluid midfield if they’re to have any chance of slowing the European champions down. Here’s how PSG could line up for the Club World Cup final against Chelsea .

arts.ttl: Chelsea Predicted Lineup vs. PSG: Caicedo Fitness Could Prove Vital
arts.sum: It’s been a mightily productive summer for Chelsea thus far, but they‘ll have to ascend their toughest peak yet to claim Club World Cup glory on Sunday. Here’s the starting XI Enzo Maresca could pick for the final.

arts.ttl: ‘They are strong but we are ready’: Marc Cucurella aims to cap dream year by sinking PSG in final
arts.sum: Defender has gone from villain to hero at Chelsea and can embellish his cult status by lifting the Club World Cup Marc Cucurella is thinking back to his early days at Chelsea. Signed from Brighton for £62m in August 2022, the left-back struggled to adapt to life at a big club. Chelsea were experiencing teething problems during the opening months of the Todd Boehly-Clearlake Capital ownership and it was Cucurella’s misfortune to be held up as a symbol of the club’s apparent malaise. It is funny to think that the Spain international was booed on to the pitch by Chelsea supporters before a Champions League match against Borussia Dortmund in February 2023. Cucurella is a cult figure these days. He is loved by the Chelsea faithful and has come a long way since that difficult first season at Stamford Bridge. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Chelsea keen on PSG's Donnarumma - Sunday's gossip
arts.sum: Paris St-Germain goalkeeper Gianluigi Donnarumma is on Chelsea's radar, Newcastle eye Eintracht Frankfurt striker Hugo Ekitike, while West Ham want Juventus midfielder Douglas Luiz, plus more.

arts.ttl: Marc Cucurella dismisses money motivation ahead of Chelsea's Club World Cup final vs PSG
arts.sum: Chelsea are up against PSG in the Club World Cup final on Sunday, knowing they will bank a huge £97m jackpot if they are victorious - but Marc Cucurella said the players were not thinking about money going into the game

arts.ttl: Marc Cucurella explains what Chelsea must do against PSG as he eyes round three with Ousmane Dembele
arts.sum: INTERVIEW WITH KIERAN GILL: Watch Ousmane Dembele when Chelsea take one of their short goal kicks on Sunday night. The PSG striker's stance will be practically primal.

arts.ttl: Robbie Williams handed Club World Cup final role as Chelsea face PSG in USA
arts.sum: Chelsea and Paris Saint-Germain face off in the first Club World Cup final under the new format - with FIFA taking a SuperBowl style approach to the occasion by enlisting Robbie Williams as the pre-match entertainment

arts.ttl: PSG boss Luis Enrique issues 'unforgettable' demand ahead of Club World Cup final vs Chelsea
arts.sum: Reigning Champions League winners PSG will lock horns with Chelsea in the Club World Cup final on Sunday and Luis Enrique has warned the Blues his side are chasing "history" at the MetLife Stadium

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs. PSG: Four Key Battles That Could Decide Club World Cup Final
arts.sum: It’s a bit silly that you can add players to your squad midway through the tournament, but Chelsea have taken advantage of FIFA’s allowance by signing João Pedro, who could function as their x-factor in Sunday’s final. Statistically, Bayern Munich were the most proficient pressers at the tournament, but PSG rank fourth for shots and second for goals resulting from high turnovers per 90 minutes (via Opta ).
